'''''Star Wars: Empire: Idiot's Array''''' was a 2-issue story arc of ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. It ran from September 08, [[2004]] to October 20, 2004.

{{Comics-stub}}

==Plot summary==
On a supply run for the Rebellion, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] runs into old flame [[Sheel Odala]] and invites her for a game of Sabacc. Unbeknownst to Solo, Odala is indebted to information broker [[Jib Kopatha]]; she betrays Han for his knowledge of the location of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance fleet]] in order to clear her debt. Eventually, she saves Han, who offers her a space in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She declines and goes her own way. [[Jib Kopatha|Kopatha]] is killed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] after his failure to procure the location of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Fleet]].
